plugins.prepareCmd: composer install --no-dev --no-interaction --prefer-dist --optimize-autoloader --ignore-platform-reqs && git config core.hooksPath /dev/null && sed -i "s/define( 'SUPERTAB_CONNECT_VERSION', '[^']*'/define( 'SUPERTAB_CONNECT_VERSION', '${nextRelease.version}'/" supertab-connect.php && sed -i "s/Version:\s*.*/Version:           ${nextRelease.version}/" supertab-connect.php && bash build-zip.sh ${nextRelease.version}
